name: Isicelo se-Tourniquet (I-Combat Application Tourniquet -- CAT)
description: Ukulawula ukopha okuqinisekile kokopha okusongela ukuphila. Faka isicelo kusenesikhathi -- ungalibali.
steps: Gcoba i-tourniquet 2-3 amayintshi (5-7 cm) eduze (ngaphezulu) kwenxeba -- phezu kwezingubo kuyamukeleka.
Zulazula ibhande elizinamathelayo eduze nengalo bese uxhuma kubhande le-adaptha yokushayisana.
Donsa ibhande liqine futhi ulivikele futhi kulona uqobo.
Phequlula induku ye-windlass kuze kuphele ukopha noma i-distal pulse ingekho.
Khiya ingilazi yomoya kukliphu yengilasi yomoya.
Faka ibhande le-windlass phezu kwenduku ye-windlass ukuze uvikeleke.
Bhala isikhathi sokufaka isicelo ngqo ku-tourniquet (sebenzisa umaka) KANYE nasekhadini le-TCCC.
Veza futhi uphinde uhlole isilonda. Phinda uhlole ngemva kwemizuzu emi-5.
warnings: UNGAYIkhiphi i-tourniquet uma isisetshenziswe emkhakheni -- abasebenzi bezokwelapha abaqeqeshiwe kuphela esimeni esilawulwayo.
Isikhathi sibalulekile: i-tourniquet> amahora angu-2 inyusa kakhulu ingozi yokulahlekelwa izitho. Log isikhathi ngokushesha.
Ungasifaki isicelo phezu kwelunga. Uma isitho sinezilonda emazingeni amaningi, sebenzisa i-proximal kuwo wonke amanxeba.
Ama-tourniquets athuthukisiwe (amabhande, izintambo) awasebenzi kahle kakhulu.

pediatric.note: Sebenzisa i-tourniquet yezingane encane uma ikhona. I-CAT evamile ingasetshenziswa kodwa iqinise ngokucophelela. Izitho zincane -- hlola i-distal pulse ngokucophelela.

obstetric.note: Ukusetshenziswa okujwayelekile kwamanxeba asemaphethelweni. Ungayifaki esiswini noma okhalweni.
